subcodes.first_line: O branch that hath sprung from the Blessed Tree! Thy glorious letter—nay rather, thy string of pearls and gems—hath reached me [3.5s]... ...May my life be offered up for the dust of these martyrs; may my entire being be a sacrifice for the blood of the chosen ones of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع النابت من الشجره المبارکه نامه نامی بلکه رشته درر و لئالی واصل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consultation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @unity; oneness of humanity, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @education of children; moral education
